name: Tabby — Docker Compose (self-hosted)
description: Self-hosted Tabby server with GPU support and persistent storage.
content:
services:
  tabby:
    image: tabbyml/tabby:latest
    command: serve --model StarCoder-1B --device cuda
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    volumes:
      - tabby-data:/data
    deploy:
      resources:
        reservations:
          devices:
            - driver: nvidia
              count: 1
              capabilities: [gpu]
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  tabby-data:

name: Tabby — CPU-only config
description: Tabby server without GPU for smaller models.
content:
services:
  tabby:
    image: tabbyml/tabby:latest
    command: serve --model StarCoder-1B --device cpu
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    volumes:
      - tabby-data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped

volumes:
  tabby-data:
